'''âth-sh-ch-n''' ('''kathashchenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ted|ted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ted|ted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-sh-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| kathashchenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
